title: please    provide support for scoop  download

comments.body: I ran into the same issue when trying to install httpie via scoop on PowerShell 7. Found this resource super helpful for understanding the scoop integration: https://pythonpackagetools.dev/articles/scoop-package-distribution-guide. It walks through the proper manifest configuration.

body:
when  I  use  scoop  install httpie  on powershell7
